hero.chip: Available for projects · Villa María, Argentina
hero.subtitle: Frontend Developer specialized in React & Next.js, microfrontends, AI and own SaaS projects

about.label: About me
about.title: Frontend developer focused on product and architecture
about.p1: I'm the sole frontend dev at IRSA, one of the largest business groups in Argentina, where I work side by side with the backend team building the UI ecosystem end-to-end.
about.p2: I'm leading the migration to microfrontends with Webpack Module Federation — a continuously evolving process learning alongside the team. I also built a real-time security app with WebSockets in collaboration with backend, with a national rollout across 100+ shopping mall stores.
about.p3: In parallel, I develop my own projects integrating Claude API, FastAPI + PostgreSQL and multi-step AI agents, exploring the potential of artificial intelligence in modern web products.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Sole frontend dev, responsible end-to-end for the UI ecosystem
Microfrontend architecture with Webpack Module Federation, ongoing process with the backend team
Published irsa-component-ui on NPM (~10 components), adopted across multiple teams
Real-time security app with WebSockets — national rollout in shopping malls, 100+ stores
Web portals: Museo de los Niños, Tax Portal, Tenant Portal

Website donated to an animal rescue foundation. Lets people collaborate or adopt an animal. Currently in progress.
Institutional website for a medical clinic. Specialties, medical coverage and online appointment system.
Website for a hardware distributor. Complete product catalog and professional online presence.
Website for a distributor. Optimized digital presence and updatable product catalog.
Online catalog for a party supplies store. Nationwide shipping and personalized customer service.
